reviews.review_title: Best ever game to exist on Earth
reviews.review_description: The devs are so good at making a game

Absolutely love this game just as much as the last one, if not even a bit more as there just more to do, a more complicated level system, and so many obstacles to watch for! Furthermore this game also just has a very distinct feel and style to it ive never seen in a game before, and thats not an understatement! The game just in my opinion scares me more then any horror game I’ve ever played, I don’t know if it’s because of the being in a ventilation system or because there’s always something out to get you no matter what and where you are, just everything together just makes the perfect horror experience if you’re brave enough to play! And please if the developer/s are reading this I ask that you please make a third game! We need a new compilation from 3FS!

- Complete night 0
-Think its gonna be easy
-Start night 1
-Go into vent and immediately get deleted by Henry
-Restart, complete first puzzle and return to charge battery
- Get murdered by the Clown
-Restart, complete both puzzles
-Think that would be the end of that
-Start charging the Door
-Get killed by a painting

Overall great experience would get murdered by weird faces, clowns and paintings again. 10/10

reviews.review_title: A VR horror game that's actually scary!
reviews.review_description: I decided to try this shortly after finishing the first installment thinking it couldn't be any more scary, I was wrong, I couldn't even finish Night 1 due to the extreme fear I felt! It's been about 2 months since I got this and I faced my fears! I am having a blast! I won't spoil anything, all I'll say is that this game is 10x scarier than the first one which I didn't even think was possible and it's also a lot more polished, I highly recommend it!

reviews.review_title: Garbage. They got rid of the crawling
reviews.review_description: And replaced it with gorilla tag movement. The “enemies” are cut up 2d jpegs instead of models, and the game explains nothing about the enemies until you die to them. One of the enemies is constantly crawling through the vents without a sound, and while you do a puzzle there is literally no way to know he is directly behind you. The crawling is also dam horrible, and you are not even in a dingy creepy crawl space, but instead you bounce around a shiny vent. Don’t even play, you’ll just get disappointed
i can't kiss monster

Don’t get me wrong this game is scary but it’s not original in anyway like the 1st game and it’s very buggy it’s like there’s gorilla glue stuck on your hands every time you try to move ￼you constantly grab your flashlight and then you can’t see then you die cus you can’t see the battery dies way to quickly and ￼these are just images off of Google ￼trying to scare you. It’s not original anymore and the only thing that is really good is the hands look better than the first games hands were I don’t think you should get the game it’s way to buggy if your looking for a scary game just play the first one.

reviews.review_title: I really tried to like this.
reviews.review_description:
I went into this game after having played and disliked the first Crawlspace, but, at the time I couldn't even really complain about it, it was a free product. This, on the other hand, cost about $6 CAD, and honestly I was optimistic. Crawlspace 1 was a year ago and surely this game would show a year's worth of improvement.

But of course you're reading this review, so you already know how that went. Clunky movement, very messy controls, and a mounted battery object on the player's back that does not accommodate for the movement, and will often find its way into the player's hand as they are crawling. The semi-clean Grab-N'-Pull movement of the first game has been replaced with Gorilla Tag-type movement, good idea on paper, but in execution, when you are placed inside of tiny vent shafts, the game doesn't feel right. 

The enemies themselves are a whole new breed of a snooze-fest. Instead of the beautifully modeled/purchased enemies of Crawlspace 1, you have actual stock image jumpscares. Don't believe me? Search for "Backrooms Scary Face" on google images and you will find the Painting Entities.

This game just feels soulless. As much as I disliked the first game, I could at least respect the fact that it was made by a dev who was so humble about his work. This just feels like it's trying to appeal to GTag Tiktok Culture and I really don't like it. Not gonna refund it because I think you should always treat Indies with respect, but I definitely am let down. Could've been so much better.

reviews.review_title: This feels like a soulless cash grab.
reviews.review_description:
Don't get me wrong, I'm a HUGE fan of the first CRAWLSPACE. This one feels like a massive downgrade. The movement is incredibly awful, you can't move two feet without grabbing your flashlight off your back and everything going dark. Stock assets and PNG faces off of Google are what you'll be getting here.

The first Crawlspace had so much charm and obvious love put into it. Not to mention the DOLLS were horrifying, and each of them were unique and brought a different challenge. THIS just feels like a soulless rip off. Movement is so incredibly janky it doesnt even feel like Crawlspace anymore. It feels like "crawl through a vent super slowly while spooky png face is turning the corner but oh wait there goes your flashlight Simulator™"

Really wanted to love this game, because the first one felt super original, and downright one of the scariest games I had played on VR. This... is not that.
